rows.label: tev000511_MSG0010
rows.name:
Since we landed on Mira, it feels like we've
just been dealing with one crisis after
another, but this just beats 'em all...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000511_MSG0020
rows.name:
If there's anything I can help you out
with— anything at all—just say the word.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000511_MSG0030
rows.name:
Since, you know... If I don't do
something to help, I'll just be
stuck here moping around...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000511_MSG0060
rows.name:
All right! Whatever you
need— just leave it to me![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000511_MSG0090
rows.name:
It's cool, I'll just stay
here and stand by. Let me
know if you change your mind![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000511_MSG0100
rows.name:
So... I've really been chosen for an elite
secret mission with the fate of humanity
at stake? ...Heck yeah! Life is GOOD![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000511_MSG0110
rows.name:
With that kinda recognition, even
the lieutenant's bound to start
seeing me as a proper soldier![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000511_MSG0120
rows.name:
O-okay, I've decided. When this is over,
I'm going to tell the lieutenant exactly
how I feel! After this one last job...![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000511_MSG0130
rows.name:
...Huh? Stop or I'm gonna jinx it?
Whoops. Sorry, guess I was getting
a little overexcited there...[ST:wait ]
